title: GitHubWebLegacyCompat
description:
NOTICE: The tweak has been deprecated. Use Reynard browser to access the website instead.

Makes GitHub website more accessible on iOS 16.3 and lower by injecting JS and CSS with unsupported syntax removed.

changes.details: Updated JS and CSS for the recent GitHub changes

title: ChatGPTWebLegacyCompat
description: Makes ChatGPT website more accessible on iOS 15.0 - 15.8 by injecting CSS with unsupported syntax removed.

changes.details: Updated CSS for the recent ChatGPT changes
Made the JS code injected only once

details: Fixed the tweak not working on iOS 15.0 - 15.3
Made the CSS code loaded from files
Depends on Polyfills 1.12.0+
Made the JS code loaded from files
Allows installation on iOS 14, but the functionality is still broken

changes.details: Allows installation on iOS 15.4 - 15.8, fixing a small layout bug with the chat input box

title: Polyfills
description:
Provides polyfills for some JavaScript features that are not available on old iOS versions.

Check out this page for recommended experimental WebKit features to enable to further enhance web compatibility.

In 2025, iOS 15 and lower are considered "old". A lot of websites would outright stop working on these versions as they no longer provide necessary polyfills.

Avoid installing version 1.5.0 to 1.9.0 on iOS 15 and lower as there is a high CPU usage bug.

changes.details: Fixed {Readable,Writable,Transform}Stream polyfills broken on old iOS versions (< 14.5)

details: Fixed polyfills that mutate CSS breaking some websites (< 18.0)
Added HTMLImageElement.loading polyfill (< 15.4)
Added IntersectionObserver polyfill (< 12.1)
Excluded meta JavaScript files (name starting with A_) from the settings

changes.details: Fixed Safari crashing when opening websites on old iOS versions

details: Fixed certain polyfills not transpiled properly
Added ResizeObserver polyfill (< 13.1)
Added VisualViewport polyfill (< 13.0)
Added Performance.timeOrigin polyfill (< 15.0)
Updated structedClone polyfill (< 15.4)
Replaced HTMLDialogElement stub with the actual polyfill (< 15.4)
Fixed EventTarget polyfill not working in some cases (< 14.0)
Note: Most of these changes are contributed by iCraze
Added Set union/intersection/difference/symmetricDifference and subset/superset/disjoint helper methods (< 17.0)
Added import() JSON module attributes support (< 17.2)
Improved Object.groupBy and Map.groupBy polyfills (< 17.4)
Improved Float16Array polyfill (< 18.2)
Added Promise.try polyfill (< 18.2)
Added Uint8Array base64/hex encoding methods (< 18.2)
Added Error.isError polyfill (< 18.4)
Added Iterator helper methods polyfill (< 18.4)
Added Map.getOrInsert and Map.getOrInsertComputed polyfills (< 26.2)
Added Math.sumPrecise polyfill (< 26.2)
Added Explicit Resource Management polyfill (< 27.1)
Added Temporal API polyfill (< 27.1)
Fixed build breaking on older Safari by disabling UglifyJS arrow transforms (< 10.0)
Improved @layer CSS polyfill for dynamically loaded stylesheets and websites using dark mode, color-mix() and oklch() (< 15.4)
Added color-mix() support to oklch color space polyfill (< 15.4)
Added -webkit-backdrop-filter CSS prefix polyfill (< 18.0)
Improved mask-* CSS properties polyfill (< 15.4)
Optimized polyfills with shared MutationObserver and CSS fetch cache (< 16.4)
Fixed polyfills sometimes not loading on the first page navigation
Fixed custom user agent not applying correctly in some cases
Fixed Sec-Fetch header injection occasionally dropping responses (< 16.4)
Improved tweak settings changes taking effect for new tabs without restarting Safari
Added per-website custom user agent feature
Improved reliability in setting custom user agent
Optimized polyfills with MutationObserver by caching and combining them (< 16.4)
Added mask-* CSS properties polyfill (< 15.4)
Added :has() support workaround to document.querySelector(All)() (< 15.4)
Added nonce HTML global attribute polyfill (< 15.4)
Added nonce propagation script for dynamically added scripts (< 15.4)
Added youtube.com/tv to User Agent spoofing blacklist so that YTLite (verback2308) signing in works
Optimized certain polyfills for performance
Added User Agent spoofing website blacklist
Added polyfill blacklist for certain websites known to not work

changes.details: Added HTMLFormElement.requestSubmit polyfill (< 16.0)

details: Added polyfill for MediaQueryList.addEventListener (< 14.0, contributed by @mgefimov)
Added HTMLElement.inert polyfill (< 15.5, contributed by @mgefimov)
Added support for global blacklist (disabling all polyfills for specific websites)
Added screen.orientation polyfill (< 16.4)
Added experimental support for adding Sec-Fetch-* headers to improve website compatibility (>= 11.0, < 16.4)
Added experimental support for Media Query Range Syntax (< 16.4)
Updated structuredClone polyfill to the latest version (< 15.4)
Fixed screen.orientation polyfill not working in some cases (< 16.4)
Fixed CSS layers polyfill causing infinite loading on some websites (< 15.4)
Fixed TestFlight apps being broken (< 16.4, contributed by iCraze)
Made web-streams-polyfill target iOS < 14.5 instead of iOS < 14.1 (< 14.5, contributed by @mgefimov)

changes.details: Added ability to enable/disable and blacklist websites from each polyfill from the tweak settings

details: Added conditional polyfills for AbortSignal and AbortController (< 15.4)
Added experimental support for oklch color space (< 15.4)
Added "Spoof User Agent" option in tweak settings to manually spoof user agent to iOS 16.3 (Some websites could break with user agent spoofing enabled such as pinterest.com)
Improved BroadcastChannel polyfill in strict website policy (< 15.4)
Improved viewport CSS workaround (< 15.4)
Fixed Document Fullscreen API polyfill breaking in strict website policy (< 16.4)
Fixed Document Fullscreen API polyfill breaking some websites (< 16.4)
Fixed String.startsWith and String.endsWith polyfills not working (< 9.0)
Disabled user agent spoofing if the existing spoofing targets higher than iOS 16.3 (< 16.4)
Made scripts from the same folder (scripts, scripts-priority or scripts-post) loaded all at once
Moved globalThis polyfill to priority scripts (< 12.1)

Added navigator.hardwareConcurrency polyfill (< 15.4)
Added support for smooth behavior in Scrolling API (< 15.4)
Improved safety checks in Document Fullscreen API polyfill (< 16.4)
Added Crypto.subtle polyfill (< 11.0)

Fixed broken functionalities in BroadcastChannel polyfill (< 15.4)
Added Float16Array polyfill (< 18.2)
Fixed CompressionStream polyfill not working in some cases (< 16.4)
Improved BroadcastChannel polyfill error handling (< 15.4)

changes.details: Spoofed iOS version to 16.3 for devices running under iOS 16.3

Made viewport CSS workaround apply to only mobile devices
Added Array.flat, String.trimStart, String.trimEnd and Symbol.description polyfills (< 12.0)
Added Promise.finally polyfill (< 11.1)
Simplified NodeList.forEach polyfill (< 10.0)

details: Made CSS Cascade layers workaround work for dynamically added stylesheets

Readded viewport CSS workaround (< 15.0)
Fixed HTMLDialogElement stub polyfill not working (< 15.4)

Fixed requesting desktop website not working in Safari

Added RegExp lookbehind polyfill (< 16.4)
Added BroadcastChannel polyfill (< 15.4)

title: RegExp Lookbehind/Indices (Polyfills)
description: Provides a polyfill for RegExp lookbehind feature (iOS 16.4+) and indices (iOS 15.0+) for older iOS versions.

changes.details: Fixed infinite recursion issue (regression of 1.3.0, contributed by iCraze)
Improved the polyfill in general
Blacklisted www.americanexpress.com due to seemingly unfixable issue

title: SteamWebLegacyCompat
description:
NOTICE: The tweak has been deprecated. Use Reynard browser to access the website instead.

Makes Steam website more accessible on iOS 16.3 and lower by injecting JS with unsupported syntax removed.

changes.details: Fixed compatibility on iOS 14

title: GitHub Legacy Fix
description: Fixes up GraphQL fields to make old GitHub iOS app work again.

changes.details: Allows installation on iOS 13 (app version 1.43.0)
Fixed Organizations page not working on app version 1.78.0 (iOS 14)
